name: adult 7+ healthy cuisine roasted chicken, carrots & spinach stew dog food
description: hill's science diet adult 7+ healthy cuisine roasted chicken, carrots & spinach stew combines the delicious flavors of roasted chicken and tender vegetables in a succulent stew --- canned dog food with the perfect balance of taste and nutrition for your dog.adult 7+ food made with high quality ingredients to ensure optimal nutrient absorption to keep your dog fit and healthy. high-quality protein for lean muscles made with purposeful ingredients for a flavorful, nutritious meal easy to digest formulated with key nutrients to support your pet’s stage of life balanced minerals for heart & kidney
